watch.japanWcTitle: How to Watch Japan's World Cup Matches
watch.japanMatchFreeNote: All 3 of Japan's World Cup matches can be watched for free (DAZN free stream or terrestrial TV)
watch.faq1Q: How can I watch all World Cup matches?
watch.faq1A: Subscribe to DAZN to watch all 104 matches streamed live. NHK BS Premium 4K also broadcasts all matches, but requires a 4K-compatible BS setup.
watch.faq2A: Japan's 3 group stage matches are streamed free on DAZN. Additionally, NHK General broadcasts 33 matches, NTV broadcasts 15 matches, and Fuji TV broadcasts 10 matches on free terrestrial TV.
watch.faq3Q: How do I watch DAZN's free Japan match streams?
watch.faq3A: Just create a free DAZN account. You don't need a paid subscription to watch Japan's matches.
watch.faq4A: DAZN is only available in the region where you have a subscription. If you live overseas, please check your local DAZN service or broadcaster.
watch.metaTitle: WC 2026 How to Watch | DAZN & Terrestrial TV Broadcast Schedule
watch.metaDescription: Where to watch FIFA World Cup 2026? DAZN streams all 104 matches, NHK 33 matches, NTV 15 matches, Fuji TV 10 matches on terrestrial TV, plus how to watch Japan's matches for free.

toto.totoDesc: Predict the results (win/loss/draw) of 13 designated matches
toto.miniTotoDesc: Predict the results of 5 designated matches
toto.goal3Desc: Predict the number of goals (0/1/2/3+) for each team in 3 matches
toto.winnerDesc: A simple lottery to predict the result of 1 match
toto.buyOnlineDesc: Easily purchase from your smartphone or PC through sites like Rakuten toto or Docomo Sports Kuji. Available 24/7.
toto.buyConvenienceDesc: Purchase from Loppi terminals at Lawson and Ministop.
toto.buyBankDesc: Purchase through some bank ATMs or internet banking.
toto.tip1: Giant killings are common in the World Cup -- upsets happen frequently in the group stage. Consider 'draw' outcomes actively.
toto.tip2: Beginners should start with mini toto or WINNER -- start by predicting 5 or just 1 match.
toto.tip3: Watch the deadline -- toto sales close before matches start. Purchase early.
toto.tip4: Check eligible matches on this site -- toto target matches will be updated on this page as they are announced.

results.warningsDesc: In the World Cup group stage, a player receiving 2 cumulative yellow cards is suspended for the next match. Cards are reset before the quarter-finals.

results.scenariosDesc: Analysis of conditions for Japan to advance from Group F. Updated as match results come in.
results.scenariosUpdateNote: As each match result comes in, we will update the latest qualification conditions and scenarios. Specific conditions such as 'must win by X or more goals' will also be posted.

groups.pageDescription: A historic first with 48 participating nations. Divided into 12 groups, with the top 2 from each group (24 teams) plus 8 best third-placed teams advancing to the knockout stage.

groups.regulationsGroup3: 1st and 2nd place automatically advance to knockout stage
groups.regulationsKnockout2: Round of 32 > Round of 16 > Quarter-finals > Semi-finals > Final

about.siteOverviewDesc1: "WC2026" (hereinafter "this site") is an unofficial comprehensive information site that provides match information and viewing guide for FIFA World Cup 2026 (North America).
about.siteOverviewDesc2: This site is an independent information site with no affiliation to FIFA, JFA (Japan Football Association), DAZN, or any other broadcasters. Published information is based on publicly available information from each official site.
about.termsIntro: By using this site, you agree to the following terms of use.
about.termsArticle1: These terms define the conditions for using this site and apply to all users who use this site.
about.termsArticle2Intro: The following actions are prohibited when using this site.
about.termsArticle2Item1: Actions that violate laws or public order and morals
about.termsArticle2Item2: Unauthorized reproduction, reprinting, or modification of this site's content

about.termsArticle2Item6: Other actions deemed inappropriate by the operator
about.termsArticle3: Copyright and other intellectual property rights of content published on this site, including text, images, and designs, belong to the operator or legitimate rights holders. Users may not use them beyond the scope of personal use without permission.
about.termsArticle4: This site contains affiliate links to external services such as DAZN. If users purchase products or services through these links, the operator may receive a referral commission. The use of affiliate links is voluntary, and no additional costs are incurred by users purchasing through the links.
about.termsArticle5: This site may contain links to external services. The operator assumes no responsibility for the content, services, or products provided by external sites. Please use external services at your own judgment and responsibility.
about.termsArticle6Item1: While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee the completeness or currency of information on this site. Please check official websites for the latest match schedules, broadcast information, etc.
about.termsArticle6Item2: The operator assumes no responsibility for any damages arising from the use of this site.
about.termsArticle6Item3: The operator assumes no responsibility for the content of external sites linked from this site.
about.termsArticle6Item4: This site may change content or suspend/terminate services without prior notice.
about.termsArticle7: The operator may change these terms without notice to users when deemed necessary. The revised terms take effect when posted on this page.
about.privacyIntro: CreationStock (hereinafter "we") sets forth this Privacy Policy regarding the handling of users' personal information on this site.
about.privacyArticle1: "Personal information" refers to "personal information" as defined by the Personal Information Protection Act, including information about living individuals that can identify a specific individual through name, date of birth, address, phone number, email address, etc., as well as usage history, IP addresses, cookies, and other characteristics that can identify a specific individual.
about.privacyArticle2Intro: We may obtain users' personal information in the following situations.
about.privacyArticle2Item1: When contacting us via inquiry forms (email address, name, etc.)
about.privacyArticle2Item2: When registering as a premium member (email address, payment information, etc.)
about.privacyArticle2Item3: Access logs during site browsing (IP address, browser information, cookies, etc.)
about.privacyArticle3Title: Article 3 (Purpose of Use of Personal Information)
about.privacyArticle3Intro: We use collected personal information for the following purposes.
about.privacyArticle3Item1: For providing and operating services on this site
about.privacyArticle3Item2: For responding to inquiries from users
about.privacyArticle3Item3: For identity verification and payment processing of premium members
about.privacyArticle3Item4: For analysis of site usage and service improvement
about.privacyArticle3Item5: For important notices and change notifications
about.privacyArticle4: We will not provide personal information to third parties without user consent, except as required by law. However, exceptions include cases required by law, cases necessary for the protection of life, body, or property, cases particularly necessary for public health or child development, and cases requiring cooperation with national agencies.
about.privacyArticle5: We take appropriate security measures to prevent leakage, loss, and damage of personal information. We also conduct necessary and appropriate supervision of employees and contractors who handle personal information.
about.privacyArticle6: This site uses cookies to improve user convenience and for access analysis. Cookies are also used for measuring results of affiliate programs (Access Trade, A8.net, etc.). Users can refuse cookies through browser settings, but some features of this site may become unavailable.
about.privacyArticle7: This site may use access analysis tools such as Google Analytics. These tools collect data using cookies, but do not include personally identifiable information. For details on data collection, please refer to each tool's privacy policy.
about.privacyArticle8Title: Article 8 (Disclosure, Correction, and Deletion of Personal Information)
about.privacyArticle8: Users may request disclosure, correction, or deletion of their personal information held by us. If desired, please contact us at the information below. After identity verification, we will respond within a reasonable period.
about.privacyArticle9: We may change this policy as needed. The revised Privacy Policy takes effect when posted on this page.
about.privacyArticle10: For inquiries about the handling of personal information, please contact us below.

watch.faq1Question: How can I watch every World Cup match?
watch.faq1Answer: A DAZN subscription gives you live streaming access to all 104 matches. NHK BS Premium 4K will also broadcast every match, though a 4K-compatible BS setup is required.
watch.faq2Question: Are any matches available for free?
watch.faq2Answer: Japan's 3 group stage matches will be streamed for free on DAZN. In addition, 33 matches will air free-to-air on NHK General, 15 on Nippon TV, and 10 on Fuji TV.
watch.faq3Question: How do I watch Japan's matches on DAZN for free?
watch.faq3Answer: Simply create a free DAZN account — no paid subscription required to watch Japan's matches.
watch.faq4Answer: DAZN is only available in the region where your account was registered. If you are based abroad, please check your local DAZN service or local broadcasters.
